[![brycenwood.ai's profile picture](https://cdn.example/pfp.jpg)](/brycenwood.ai/)

[

brycenwood.ai


](/brycenwood.ai/)

 Edited•14w

ChatGPT is recommending my vehicle wrap shop to people searching for wraps in Utah. I didn't pay for it. I set it up with one file.
It's called llms.txt. It sits on your website and tells AI assistants what your business does, where you are, and why someone should choose you. It took me 5 minutes to create with Claude Code.
How long before every business has one of these?
[#chatgpt](/explore/tags/chatgpt/) [#vibecoding](/explore/tags/vibecoding/) [#aimarketing](/explore/tags/aimarketing/)
